programme.desc: CSI Miami Lieutenant Horatio and the entire NY Crime Lab races against the clock to catch a twisted sociopath before he kills again in this second part of the CSI: Miami/CSI: NY crossover episode.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, Mac and his team work to find out why. In Central Park's Strawberry Fields, Hawkes and Danny come across a body they instantly recognise: a TV weather girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll "hospital", Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll "doctor". Meanwhile, Stella and Hawkes find a young woman dead in her apartment.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a match, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate. Hawkes and Danny unravel the mystery of why a struggling novelist was killed.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead and when Danny begins to process the scene, he trips a 'panic' button, sealing himself in with the body. And who pushed a stripper onto a 10,000-degree spotlight and left her to sizzle?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Hawkes and Danny investigate the death of two models at New York City's hottest fashion show. Stella and Lindsay use blood recovered from leeches to prove a man's innocence.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Lindsay and Hawkes investigate what looks to be a prank. Stella and Danny try to find out if a broker found hanging out of his office window committed suicide or if he was an office politics victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the host of an art show Stella is attending is skewered to his date, she knows that her evening will be all work and no play. And the dead body of a music promoter is found entirely covered in the glue.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Mac examine a case in which a man was shot because of the city's dangerous water gun wars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her apartment building's water tower, Mac and Lindsay team up to find her killer. Meanwhile, Stella and Hawkes find their victim in a playground.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella discover a corpse being devoured by beetles at a museum. As they search for the villain behind the gruesome crime, Danny and Flack examine a case in which a man was insulated to death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Flack investigate the death of a medical intern and an illegal organ trafficking job. As Stella and Lindsey look into the death of a young woman found with a bicycle spoke stuck in her neck.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a patient from a mental hospital, is found dead in an alleyway Mac and Stella retrace his steps to find his murderer. As Danny and Lindsay find a popular football star murdered in his luxurious hotel suite.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an anonymous caller tells Mac there is a dead body buried at Giant's Stadium, evidence points to one of the CSIs. Across, town Stella and Danny find a banker stabbed to death in his hotel suite.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a limo driver at a Kid Rock concert. Meanwhile, Mac finds Stella, unconscious and battered, in her apartment.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Danny and Lindsey discover a young woman's body, dressed as a mermaid and floating in a bed of kelp. Meanwhile, Mac and Stella investigate the death of a man who is survived by his two wives.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a Marine is found dead in Central Park, Mac uses his military wits to solve the crime; across town, the team investigate the death of a woman found in a torched car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Flack rush to the scene of a crime. While investigating the murder, a bomb is detonated and Flack is sent to the hospital with severe injuries.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Lindsay and Hawkes investigate what looks to be a prank. Stella and Danny try to find out if a broker found hanging out of his office window committed suicide or if he was an office politics victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.sub-title: And Here's To You, Mrs. Azrael
programme.desc: A young girl is found murdered in her hospital room, five days after getting into a car accident which left her paralysed and her passenger dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the death of a hotel employee at a swimsuit modelling shoot, the CSI team hears shots across the street and run to another crime scene where a shocked woman has just shot an intruder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman dies after she starts bleeding from her eyes, nose, and mouth while at a party aboard a subway train, leading the team to speculate that she is the victim of a biological attack.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a young paintball champion is found dead in a warehouse. They soon find out that his fiercest rival, with whom he was faced in a death match, has gone missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.sub-title: And Here's To You, Mrs. Azrael
programme.desc: A young girl is found murdered in her hospital room, five days after getting into a car accident which left her paralysed and her passenger dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A parachute jumper meets his death when his parachute is struck by a flock of pigeons, all of which strangely end up dead beside his body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a bartender is robbed and shot. When the police capture a suspect matching a witness' description, the team is stunned when the suspect is Sheldon Hawkes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes have a problem when they find out that the family of a murder victim are all deaf, so they have to find a new way to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A well-heeled man is found dead in a vacant apartment, but the evidence suggests that the victim may have been killed by someone he kidnapped.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A female impersonator who performed at a party in a ritzy hotel is found dead in a men's room stall, drowned in the toilet.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes investigate the death of a college student and learn of his involvement with a secret society.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a music industry mogul is murdered in his high-end penthouse apartment, Mac, Stella, and the team must rely on the crime's only witness, the victim's sister, to solve their case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is found shot dead in a rundown Rockaway Beach house under a pile of money. Outside in his backyard is an ark that contains animals and eight people.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman is found sawn in half inside a magician's wooden box onstage in an abandoned Times Square theatre. The investigation reveals the victim worked for a famous illusionist.

programme.title: Food Safari
programme.desc: Discover all things Turkish food, when the safari hits Turkey.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Home Cooking
programme.desc: In this episode, Gordon shows us how to make deliciously healthy food. Recipes include brilliant bircher muesli, stunning gazpacho soup, and his daughter, Tilly, helps Gordon cook an irresistible healthy teriyaki salmon.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie spices up a barbecue chicken burger, and demonstrates how to dial down the heat for little ones.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Simple Comforts
programme.desc: Mary visits Ireland, where humble comfort food is at the heart of local cuisine. She makes a salmon and fennel one-pot wonder, slow-roast pork with Colcannon mash and a coffee and praline cake.

programme.title: Eat Well For Less
programme.desc: Gregg and Chris are in Bromley with a family bored of the same old meals, to get them all to play their part in the kitchen.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Top chefs from across the UK return for season 20 of Great British Menu, competing to impress judges with inventive dishes and secure a place at the prestigious final banquet.

programme.title: Inside the Factory
programme.desc: Presenters explore factories to uncover how favourite foods & products are made, while historian Ruth Goodman reveals the fascinating history behind each manufacturing process.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The series kicks off with Cake Week. First up, in the signature bake, the bakers get the opportunity to put their twist on the classic Battenburg.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Simple Comforts
programme.desc: Mary visits Ireland, where humble comfort food is at the heart of local cuisine. She makes a salmon and fennel one-pot wonder, slow-roast pork with Colcannon mash and a coffee and praline cake.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie spices up a barbecue chicken burger, and demonstrates how to dial down the heat for little ones.

programme.title: James Martin's Home Comforts
programme.desc: Whether it's a dinner for two or lunch for a crowd, James makes no-fuss food that is uncomplicated and easy to create and serve. He is joined by special guest Nicola Adams.

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food Family Classics
programme.desc: Jamie continues his journey around the world. In Sardinia, he's amazed by a rare local pasta. In Switzerland, he experiences a Swiss chard lunch, and in South Korea he tastes one of 167 types of fermented kimchi.

programme.title: Jamie: Fast and Simple
programme.desc: Jamie shows a traybake method for maximum flavour. He makes roast veg & Camembert fondue, then a fish supper & poached chicken. Plus spicy salsa & chocolate tiramisu.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: Rick ends his culinary tour in Bangladesh, the country that spawned thousands of Indian restaurants in Britain years ago. Not surprisingly, curry is at the top of his list.

programme.title: Inside the Factory
programme.desc: Presenters explore factories to uncover how favourite foods & products are made, while historian Ruth Goodman reveals the fascinating history behind each manufacturing process.

programme.title: Justine Schofield Queensland Gourmet
programme.desc: In order to make her smokey eggplant & cocoa dip, Justine sources some local Cocoa in Mosman. At the Witches Chase she makes an omelette with not 1, not 2 but 3 types of cheese.

programme.title: Left Off the Map
programme.desc: The team travel to Australia's often forgotten state of Tasmania to explore the lifestyle, quirky characters, and spectacular food.

programme.title: River Cottage Australia
programme.desc: Tough times for Paul when he asks home butcher and friend Matt to help him slaughter his first goat. When Paul helps to rebuild a community garden, the goat goes to a good cause.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's My Swedish Kitchen
programme.desc: Rachel serves a grilled lobster with a cabbage and caraway salad. Then she makes her own gravlax poke bowl, and for desserts she prepares white chocolate berry coconut mountains.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo: Little Paris Kitchen
programme.desc: Rachel gives cassoulet a twist as a soup, bakes a pistachio and goat's cheese cake, and visits an award-winning cheese shop in Paris.

programme.title: The Great American Bake Off
programme.desc: Bakers created a single-layer olive oil cake, tackled an angel food cake for the technical, and crafted a three-layer chocolate gateau with chocolate icing for the showstopper.

programme.title: Gino's Italian Express
programme.desc: Gino's train journey takes him on a star-studded line up of Tuscan cities, starting off in Pisa, the city famed for its leaning tower.

programme.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programme.desc: Ainsley is joined by Genevieve Taylor and Nico Reynolds in the kitchen garden at Tyntesfield in Somerset for an al fresco cook off.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Sister Brigid acts as a babysitter when Dr. Ormerod is called to deal with a major emergency.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: As ground breaking begins on a rock quarry in the moorlands, a local woman who had opposed the construction is found murdered.

programme.title: The Frankenstein Chronicles
programme.desc: Marlott visits the house of artist William Blake and confers with Nightingale who has been keeping watch on a public house, The pair set up a cunning 'sting' to capture a person of interest.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When the boys end up in the hospital they decide to prove their worth by getting to the bottom of a mysterious case of a patient who was murdered ten years previously.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: When the care home which Pullman's mother was due to move into comes under suspicion for an unsolved death, the boys go undercover.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: The Adventure Of The Italian Nobleman
programme.desc: Poirot investigates the murder of an Italian count who was also the employer of Miss Lemon's new boyfriend. He soon learns that the victim was being targeted by a blackmailer.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The unexplained poisoning of a former detective sergeant leads Endeavour and Thursday to a local cinema.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Animal House
programme.desc: This raunchy, screwball comedy offers a relentless spoof of 1960s college life by following the hilarious adventures of the Delta fraternity.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: A bank robber escaping jail finds himself stealing something more precious than money - a Federal Marshall's heart - risking it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands Frank in debt to a ruthless and dangerous Copenhagen drug lord.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: Quest for Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning...and murder.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: While driving through Nebraska two young lovers stumble upon a cult made up of murderous, demon-worshiping children. Based on a Stephen King horror story.

programme.title: Children of the Corn II: Final Sacrifice
programme.desc: When the mutilated bodies of adults are found in Nebraska no one believes that the killers could be children hiding in the cornfields. A journalist covering the story delves into the truth.

programme.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
programme.desc: Act three in the horror series based on a Stephen King story. Two brothers are adopted by a family. Deadly occurrences follow, amid revelations that one boy was in a bizarre cult in Nebraska.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Dust Devil
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

programme.title: Top Knot Detective
programme.desc: Takashi Takamoto begins writing jingles for a well-known Japanese company and ends up creating a bloody series of samurai action that, over time, becomes a cult series.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: As he investigates the missing person report of a teenager, detective Kozenczak becomes concerned that local businessman John Wayne Gacy may be responsible. However, their evidence is circumstantial.

programme.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: All Hallows' Eve
programme.desc: On Halloween, a babysitter finds an old VHS tape in the kids' trick or treat bag. The tape features three tales of terror, all linked together by a murderous clown.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: As the seconds tick down to midnight, an ex-con becomes a reluctant hero trapped by a masked "Collector" in a maze of lethal invention while trying to rescue the very family he came to rob.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Crabs!
programme.desc: In the middle of prom night, a swarm of murderous crabs descends upon a small coastal town.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: When dangerous criminals on a cargo ship are transported from the Phillipines to South Korea, they unleash a sinister force after an escape attempt leads to a riot. (Subtitles)

programme.title: The Raid
programme.desc: A SWAT team is trapped in a tenement run by a ruthless mobster and his army of killers and thugs. Stranded on the sixth floor, they must fight their way through the city's worst to survive.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: An employee of a floral shop hangs himself when a colleague goes to his apartment to investigate his absence from work.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: A young boy in a small North Dakota town befriends a potentially dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped by a cult, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Emma must uncover the dark secret behind a cursed radio to survive and protect her family.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line
programme.desc: Packaged sweets at JFK Airport; a Dutch visitor travels stateside; mistaken identity for a traveller in Washington State; party girls' plans are deflated.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: A traveller's strange behaviour suggests illegal activity. Officers stop an American with unlawful plans. Biosecurity find bones in a woman's bag with a sinister intent.

programme.title: Police Ten 7
programme.desc: Join Rob Lemoto for a closer look at the dramatic working lives of New Zealand's police force and the Kiwis who end up on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Constables are horrified when they spot a van full of unrestrained children. The potential for carnage is enormous, but the mother seems more concerned about her brand new phone.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers across the US patrol the streets, targeting car thieves, drug dealers, and violent offenders to stop anyone stepping onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A late-night search yields surprises, suspects' lies unravel, and officers urge a woman to turn her life around to protect her dogs.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A driver is stopped for a traffic violation. Cash and drugs are found in a man's car. A woman is threatened with scissors. A vehicle is stopped for numerous violations and is deemed unsafe.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: An attempted car towing turns into a standoff with authorities. The occupants of a pot-pungent car quickly implicate themselves. Officers investigate alleged gunplay. A jealous boyfriend is arrested.

programme.desc: A girl fights for her life after being hit by a car. An exploding gas canister leaves a man with severe burns & a scaffolding fall causes a spinal injury.

programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.
